title: Universal minecraft modpack (VR support)
description:
A massive minecraft overhaul Modpack!! 
Including massive updates to many features! 
FULL CREDIT TO THE INDIVIDUAL MOD DEVS!
body:
(WARNING!! DOWNLOAD THE CORRECT VERSION OF THE MODPACK DEPENDING ON HOW YOU WILL PLAY!!!
if you are planing on playing VR download the VR version, if you are playing Desktop/3rd person pick desktop/3rd person!) **both will still work together for multiplayer**

Drive download: [https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/10DP5z9xtdTjNvQ-5yoh_8iegC1eVSF4t]
A "Everything Update" modpack! 

New weapons for combat through "Weapons Expanded"!
End & Nether updates through "Better nether" and "better end"!
Herobrine through "From the Fog"! 
And so many more!

More mobs! More structures! More Minecraft!
Modpack includes VR versions AND desktop versions! With parity between the two for ultimate multiplayer! 

Mod list (3rd person/desktop ver):
